buildings.name: Senate Building
buildings.description: Administrative hub of the University of Ilorin, housing the Vice-Chancellor's office and central administration.

buildings.name: University Library
buildings.description: The main university library with study spaces, computer labs, and research collections.

buildings.name: Faculty of Communication and Information Sciences
buildings.description: Home to the Department of Computer Science, Telecommunication Science, and Information Technology.

buildings.name: Faculty of Engineering and Technology
buildings.description: Engineering departments including Civil, Electrical, Mechanical, and Agricultural Engineering.

buildings.name: Student Union Building
buildings.description: Cafeteria, student union offices, and common areas for student activities.

buildings.name: Sports Complex
buildings.description: University stadium and sports facilities including football pitch and basketball courts.
